_meta.note: Factual/structural data only. Marketing copy below is original, not copied from the source listing. Verify all fields with the business owner before launch, especially items flagged 'TBD'.

business.name: Bali Fishing Trips
business.tagline: Private fishing charters out of Serangan, Bali

location.exactAddress: TBD — confirm harbor departure point / map pin with owner

flaggedForVerification.note: Source listing shows 4 knots, implausible for this engine setup — likely a data-entry error on FishingBooker's end. Confirm real figure before publishing.

tripPackages.name: Sharing Trip
tripPackages.description: A relaxed half-day out on a shared boat — a good fit if you want to fish without booking the whole vessel.

tripPackages.name: Sunset Trip
tripPackages.description: A shorter afternoon trip timed to end with the sunset over the water — the whole boat to yourselves.

tripPackages.name: Half Day Trip – Private
tripPackages.description: A private morning charter for up to four anglers, with the full boat and crew focused on your group.

tripPackages.name: 3/4 Day Trip
tripPackages.description: Extra time on the water for groups who want more than a half day without committing to a full one.

tripPackages.name: 6 Hours Jigging and Casting
tripPackages.description: A technique-focused trip for anglers who specifically want jigging and casting over trolling.

tripPackages.name: Full Day Trip
tripPackages.description: The full day out, reaching further offshore grounds with the most time to find fish.

tripPackages.name: Full Day Trip – Jigging and Popping
tripPackages.description: A full day built around jigging and popping technique, for anglers targeting a specific style of fishing.

includedAsStandard: Free cancellation up to 30 days before the trip

reviewThemes.note: Aggregate stats only, safe to reuse. Do not scrape or publish individual review text — replace with 3-5 original, owner-permissioned testimonials before launch.

contentNeededFromClient: Confirmed brand/legal name for the standalone site
Original photography (boat, crew, catches) — not FishingBooker-hosted images
WhatsApp number and preferred contact method
Crew names and bios, if including a 'Meet the Captain' section
3-5 written testimonials with permission to publish
Payment details, if Phase 2 deposit payments are added
